title: Bothan stun spore
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Bothan stun spores''' were a microscopic<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> type of [[stun spore]] that caused respiratory irritation,<ref name="PP">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref> and were used in the compound [[Spore/B]].<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref> The spores entered a target's respiratory system,<ref name="PP" /> numbing it<ref name="AEG">''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]''</ref> and causing disorientation<ref name="EGWT" /> all while slowing the victim's breathing until unconsciousness. Although meant to be non-fatal, the spores could cause [[Death/Legends|death]] if the victim went into respiratory failure.<ref name="PP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 13: Prisoner of the Nikto Pirates]]'' {{1st}}
